title: The Rescue Race Starts
description: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nico Robin, Nami, Spandam. Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I guess they've done their job well.

summary: Back in Enies Lobby, the Straw Hats fully reject the World Government’s authority and stand with Robin.
